title: solanum tomentosum var. burchellii
intro: Solanum tomentosum var. burchellii, also known as the hairy nightshade, is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and protecting against infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Solanum tomentosum var. burchellii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, and topical creams for external application.
